plugins.name: forensic-deepdive
plugins.description: Persistent code knowledge graph + 9 composite MCP tools (impact, context, archaeology, flow, query, record_insight, recall_insights, visualize, trace) for AI coding agents. Five durable markdown artifacts as the human-readable projection.
